title: Presented at Microscopy 2025: automated defect detection using SEM
summary: Dr Smith presented the team's machine learning pipeline for automated surface defect classification at the Microscopy 2025 conference in Birmingham.

title: New partnership with Meridian Advanced Materials Ltd
summary: The group has entered a three-year collaborative assessment programme with Meridian Advanced Materials to characterise surface integrity in high-performance turbine blades.

title: Paper accepted in the Journal of Materials Science
summary: A study on fatigue crack initiation in nickel-based superalloys has been accepted for publication, featuring high-resolution TEM images and EBSD analysis.

title: Defect analyser tool v2.0 released
summary: An updated release of the open-source defect classification tool adds support for TEM images and a new random forest classifier for multi-class defect detection.

title: Hosted industry workshop on electron microscopy best practices
summary: Ten companies participated in a one-day workshop covering sample preparation, imaging protocols, and data analysis for surface defect characterisation.
